author: fix-ports-agent
content: Plan: Fix 3 bugs from PR #1136 review: (1) CRITICAL: test_get_with_popup_blocking — add server: ServerUrls fixture param, replace url_a/url_b with dynamic construction using _url(server.base, ...). (2) MAJOR: start_server() — replace os.chdir() with SimpleHTTPRequestHandler directory= parameter to avoid global state mutation. (3) Remove dead code: ServerUrls.url() method and ServerUrls.base_noscheme property (never used anywhere).
